provisions.description: Allows CDBG-DR funds allocated for Hurricane Matthew and Hurricane Florence to be used interchangeably in the most impacted and distressed areas. Amounts from PL 114-223, PL 114-254, PL 115-31, and PL 115-123 allocated for Hurricane Matthew may be used for Hurricane Florence activities, and vice versa. Also allows administrative costs from various disaster CDBG-DR appropriations to be used for any related disaster without regard to the particular disaster appropriation.

notes: Subsection (a) allows interchangeable use of Matthew/Florence funds
Subsection (b) allows administrative costs to be used across disaster appropriations
Subsection (c) provides emergency/disaster relief designations for repurposed amounts

provisions.description: Secretary shall publish in the Federal Register the allocations and administrative requirements for all mitigation activities under the Community Development Fund heading in PL 115-123 within 90 days of enactment. provisions.description: For purposes of this Act, consequences or impacts of any hurricane include damages caused during the entirety of its duration as a cyclone, as defined by the National Hurricane Center.
provisions.title: XII
provisions.raw_text: For purposes of this Act, the consequences or impacts of any hurricane shall include damages caused by the storm at any time during the entirety of it
notes: Ensures pre-hurricane and tropical storm-phase damages are covered

provisions.description: Any amount designated as emergency and subsequently designated by the President that is transferred pursuant to authorities in this Act shall retain such designation.
